overview: Angel Longevity Medical Center specializes in root-cause healing through functional and alternative medicine, using personalized treatment plans to address underlying causes of chronic illness. Led by Dr. Anju Mathur, MD (board-certified in anti-aging and regenerative medicine), the clinic offers in-person care in Southern California and telemedicine nationwide.
highlights: Extensive testing services including DUTCH, telomere, heavy metal, and viral panels
IV therapy treatments (vitamin infusions, glutathione, NAD, chelation, ozone therapy)
Multiple wellness programs (weight loss, healthy aging, hormone balance)
targetAudience: People with chronic conditions, hormonal imbalances, or autoimmune disorders seeking functional medicine alternatives to conventional care.
